methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the collected pollen data, including conversion to proportions, linear modeling, correlation analysis, and species richness estimation.

steps.description: Convert all values to proportions of the total sample to control for differences in sample size.
steps.searchable_summary: convert data values to proportions of total sample

steps.description: Pair observations by consolidating datasets based on species composition and extract equivalent sample and species abundance.
steps.searchable_summary: consolidate datasets based on species composition

steps.description: Analyze data using general linear models and gauge model strength using adjusted R2 value.
steps.searchable_summary: perform general linear modeling and calculate adjusted R2

steps.description: Plot corresponding linear models using ggplot2.
Evaluate rank-based correlations using Spearman's method and product-moment correlations using Pearson's method.
Explore species richness estimates by generating species accumulation curves and plotting rarefaction curves.
steps.searchable_summary: generate and plot species accumulation and rarefaction curves

steps.description: Convert relative proportions to binary presence/absence values and generate rate of agreement between methods.
steps.searchable_summary: convert proportions to binary values and calculate agreement rate

methods.description: Procedures for processing sequence data, including trimming, pairing, filtering, and preparing data for barcoding assignments.

steps.description: Trim primers, pair forward and reverse reads, filter out low quality reads and sequencing errors, and group identical sequences under unique ASVs.
steps.searchable_summary: trim, pair, filter reads, and group sequences into ASVs

steps.description: Align forward and reverse reads and remove misaligned sequences and chimeras.
steps.searchable_summary: align reads and remove misaligned sequences and chimeras

steps.description: Perform quality control and format output into a matrix with abundance values for each ASV and sample.
steps.searchable_summary: perform quality control and format data into abundance matrix

steps.description: Build a database linking species to unique sequences using the Meta-Curator method.
Parse sequence data to identify species associated with each ASV, setting a similarity threshold.
steps.searchable_summary: identify species for each ASV with similarity threshold

steps.description: Consolidate classifications at genus and family levels and prepare data for filtering.
steps.searchable_summary: consolidate classifications and prepare data for filtering

steps.description: Filter data to remove mistag-associated false detections using negative controls.
steps.searchable_summary: filter data to remove mistag-associated false detections
